name: Delta Corp Limited
summary: Delta Corp Limited engages in the gaming and entertainment, and hospitality businesses in India and internationally. The company owns and operates three offshore casinos, including Deltin Royale, Deltin JAQK, and Deltin Caravela in Goa; a casino in Nepal; and a live gaming casino in Sikkim, which offer various games, such as roulette, baccarat, blackjack, craps or dice, pontoon, 5-card draw poker, and 3-card poker, as well as slot machines. It also operates Adda52.com, an online poker site; and Adda52Rummy, an online rummy portal. In addition, the company owns The Deltin, a 176 room five star hotel in Daman; Deltin Suites, a 106 room all-suite hotel in north Goa; and a Villa in Goa. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Mumbai, India.
